video: What is Linked List Explained in Hindi l Data Structure

entries.original_phrase: bhagdaud
entries.literal_translation: running around / hustle
entries.context: To engineering exam se pehle apni bhagdaud bahut chal rahi hoti hai.

entries.original_phrase: ek dost se dusre dost ki taraf bhagte... knowledge gain karte rehte hain
entries.literal_translation: run from one friend to another... keep gaining knowledge
entries.context: To hum ek dost se dusre dost ki taraf bhagte, dusre se teesre ki taraf bhagte hain aur knowledge gain karte rehte hain, knowledge gain karte rehte hain.

entries.original_phrase: sawal
entries.literal_translation: question
entries.context: ...paper mein kaun sa sawal aane wala hai...

entries.original_phrase: paper khali na jaye
entries.literal_translation: paper doesn't go empty
entries.context: ...taki main kuch likh pau, paper khali na jaye bhaiya apna...

entries.original_phrase: B ke paas bhag
entries.literal_translation: run to B
entries.context: ...Wo bolta hai B ke paas bhag bhaiya, jo banda B hai na...

entries.original_phrase: paper khali chhodenge
entries.literal_translation: will leave the paper empty
entries.standard_term: Fail the exam / Submit an empty paper
entries.context: ...apan aisa to nahi ki paper khali chhodenge...

entries.original_phrase: teen dost
entries.literal_translation: three friends
entries.context: Ye jo aapke teen dost the na jinhone aapki madad ki hai, these are nothing but the nodes of your linked list.

entries.original_phrase: agle kahan jau main
entries.literal_translation: where should I go next
entries.context: ...jab maine usse pucha reference ki aage bhaiya chapter two, agla reference, agla kahan jau main, to usne bola iske paas ja.

entries.original_phrase: Yahan se jana hai aapko yahan pe
entries.literal_translation: You have to go from here to here
entries.context: Yahan se jana hai aapko yahan pe, sahi baat hai?

entries.original_phrase: is node tak mujhe jana hai
entries.literal_translation: I need to go to this node
entries.context: Isse mujhe access karna hai, is node tak mujhe jana hai.

entries.original_phrase: ek sequence mein sare memory location lage pade the
entries.literal_translation: all memory locations were arranged in a sequence
entries.context: Array mein humne kya dekha tha bhaiya, ek sequence mein sare memory location lage pade the, contiguous memory location.

entries.original_phrase: agla chapter
entries.literal_translation: next chapter
entries.context: Fir isne bola agla chapter to yahan pe C le liya.

entries.original_phrase: subject ki sari study khatam ho gayi
entries.literal_translation: all subject study is finished
entries.context: Ab iske baad to bhaiya mera subject ki sari study khatam ho gayi to mujhe aage jane ki zarurat nahi hai.

entries.original_phrase: sara mamla khatam ho jata hai
entries.literal_translation: the whole matter ends
entries.context: To yahan jab bhaiya sara mamla khatam ho jata hai, matlab jo indicate karta hai the end of the linked list,

entries.original_phrase: first chapter ke liye kisse approach karna hai
entries.literal_translation: who to approach for the first chapter
entries.context: Shuruat mein maine kya bataya tha ki mujhe pata hai ki mujhe first chapter ke liye kisse approach karna hai.

entries.original_phrase: sabse pehli jo shuruat mujhe karni hai apne linked list ki
entries.literal_translation: the very first start I have to make for my linked list
entries.context: Matlab sabse pehli jo shuruat mujhe karni hai apne linked list ki ya fir knowing about the subject that I have to give or appear for exam, uski shuruat mujhe chapter one se karni thi, to mujhe pata tha ki iske paas jana hai.

entries.original_phrase: chapter one se karni thi
entries.literal_translation: had to start from chapter one
entries.context: uski shuruat mujhe chapter one se karni thi, to mujhe pata tha ki iske paas jana hai.

entries.original_phrase: head pointer karke cheez hoti hai
entries.literal_translation: there is a thing called head pointer
entries.context: To wo bhai sahab yahan pe ek head pointer karke cheez hoti hai.

entries.original_phrase: sabse pehle wala jo node hota hai
entries.literal_translation: the very first node that is
entries.context: ek head pointer hota hai jo aapke sabse pehle wala jo node hota hai jaise ki is case mein A hai, use point karta hai.

entries.original_phrase: sab yahan pe samapt khatam
entries.literal_translation: everything ends here finished
entries.context: Null matlab bhaiya sab yahan pe samapt khatam.

entries.original_phrase: sirf forward forward forward matlab aage aage aage ka hi sochta hai, aage aage aage ka hi dekhta hai
entries.literal_translation: only thinks forward forward forward meaning only thinks about what's ahead, only looks ahead
entries.context: Jo kya karta hai bhaiya, sirf forward forward forward matlab aage aage aage ka hi sochta hai, aage aage aage ka hi dekhta hai.

entries.original_phrase: sirf aage ka nahi, wo piche ka bhi dekhta hai
entries.literal_translation: not just forward, it also looks backward
entries.context: Matlab wo sirf aage ka nahi, wo piche ka bhi dekhta hai bhai.

entries.original_phrase: Circle ban gaya
entries.literal_translation: A circle was formed
entries.context: To yahan kya ban gaya? Circle ban gaya.

entries.original_phrase: Yahan se shuru hua, wapas aa gaya
entries.literal_translation: It started from here, came back
entries.context: Yahan se shuru hua, wapas aa gaya, yahan se shuru ho gaya, wapas aa gaya.

entries.original_phrase: last node aapke linked list ke first node ko connected hota hai
entries.literal_translation: last node of your linked list is connected to the first node
entries.standard_term: Tail Node Connection to Head Node
entries.context: jahan pe aapka last node aapke linked list ke first node ko connected hota hai

entries.original_phrase: point kar raha hota hai
entries.literal_translation: is pointing
entries.context: ya fir point kar raha hota hai simple way mein.
